thought_beat_text: The seams won't blur back into invisibility, and the fingerprint in the clay is still there—still *his*—but if he names it aloud the whole corridor collapses into stage-light and foam-core. So he stands in the checkpoint pretending the ritual still holds, that sincerity and performance haven't become the same thing.
residue_summary: The admission is lodged in his throat now—he can see through the set but cannot speak it without breaking the shared world.
image_hint: figure frozen mid-corridor, walls suddenly transparent but mouth sealed
audio_hint: held breath under distant stage-light hum, a single metallic ping waiting to fall
